title: Soak Test - No Headset connected, app in the background, phone idle
scenario: Poly Studio Mobile app remains responsive after prolonged idle soak test on Home Screen with no headset connected
steps: 1. Ensure no Poly Bluetooth audio device is connected to the phone.
2. Launch the Poly Studio Mobile app.
4. Put the app in the background (e.g., press the Home button or switch to another app).
5. Leave the phone idle for multiple hours (e.g., overnight).
6. After several hours, bring the Poly Studio Mobile app back to the foreground.
7. Verify the app is still running and responsive.
expected: The Poly Studio Mobile app remains running and responsive after being in the background for an extended period. No crashes, freezes, or memory-related issues occur.
